Neon Ninja Run

Support

Need help with Neon Ninja Run?

Send us a clear note with your device, iOS version, and what happened. Screenshots or screen recordings help a lot.

support@neonninjarun.com

Common Help Topics

Purchases and restore

Open the Store or Premium Shop and use Restore Purchases. Make sure you are signed into the same Apple ID used for the original purchase.

Ads and rewards

Rewarded ads require a network connection and ad availability. If no ad is ready, wait a moment and try again.

Game Center

Leaderboards and achievements require Game Center to be enabled in iOS Settings.

Gameplay feedback

If a level, enemy, modifier, or reward feels wrong, include the chapter name and the mode you were playing.

Neon Ninja Run

Fast action arcade running in neon worlds.
